reviews.review_description: Getting a no Internet connection on startup when everything else obviously works. Stopped working a couple of weeks after I paid full price. Buggy app and total waste of money
Always says no internet connect and some SSL ERROR.

Keep getting no connection error. Very annoying. Spoke to customer service and they were of no help either. Seems like the support for this version has stopped. Do not waste your on this app or their other products.

Installed the app and its keep on showing no internet connection. I checked multiple times and verified that I have active internet connection. I’m able to play YouTube VR and other apps that require internet connection. Everything works fine except this one.

developer_response.body:
Update: Hi new update is now available. You can download the update and play the game.

Hi, sorry for the inconvenience we are giving an update in 30 mins.

reviews.review_description: Wonderful game. I expect that it will become more realistic with future updates.

Quite honestly I bought Oculus because of this game, that’s how great it is. Another confession, I’m not a big fan of virtual games but again this app got me hooked into it
Only suggestion would be to include named cricketers and stadiums etc but I’m sure that’ll come with time
Excellent platform to all ameture players who missed their time in cricket career, Again can showcase their talent to world.
its like a dream comes true to me. i am never expected to feel or play any thing like that. some errors are there but its not in count when u play such a mind blowing game...
All of a sudden this game dont work it shows Contact The company of there website ...

developer_response.body: This error is due to Oculus Servers being down for hours. Please reinstall to make it work. Please contact us on https://discord.gg/pu8TRhpX

reviews.review_title: Best immersive vr feel cricket game
reviews.review_description: Simply superb
I don’t know why after the latest update I am getting the error whenever I start the ibcricket game on my quest 2. Anyone else gets it ?

developer_response.body:
Hi, there have been global outage of Oculus!! We have given updates to address this to some extent.
Please make sure your oculus software is up to date. If you are still facing the issues please contact us on https://discord.gg/xVUWeauR

reviews.review_description: Best game ever￼
Wow. When the fans arrived with my “Lord of the Eggs” banner, I knew I was king of cricket. This game is just too fùcking good. Bravo!!!
I just bought it a couple days ago. I’m still getting into the groove of it. I love how realistic the game is. I can’t wait to log back on to play some more.
Been playing this game again & again for hours. Well, there are many game modes to hook you like quick start, challenges, tournaments, etc.
No other positions only batsman
Amazing game with a lot of content. Really enjoyed playing this game.

There are some issues in regards to bat controller. I spoke to the support and they said that bat can not be used on the left controller.  As a right handed batsman I feel left controller is important to get the feel of the shots. None the less a good game but needs more improvements.

The developers have done an excellent job.
Its really fun and competitive. 

Playing in Quest 2. Even though the comfort level is said to be unrated for Quest 2, the only glitch I found so far is sometimes the headset looses track of the bat if the bat swing is from behind the head.

I hope IB cricket will include individual players career records in future updates.
Only thing that could make this game better is a career mode. The details in this game are amazing. Jerseys, celebrations, crowd noise, commentary, bowling styles.
